question: What is the name of the country with the most car makers?
gold_sql: SELECT T2.CountryName FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN COUNTRIES AS T2 ON T1.Country  =  T2.CountryId GROUP BY T1.Country ORDER BY Count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.attr_0a984f FROM countries AS T1 JOIN car_makers AS T2 ON T1.attr_df978e = T2.nation GROUP BY T1.attr_df978e ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
raw_response: SELECT T1.attr_0a984f FROM countries AS T1 JOIN car_makers AS T2 ON T1.attr_df978e = T2.nation GROUP BY T1.attr_df978e ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
